step_rationale: Complement regulator modulating inflammatory response post-MI and long-term remodeling.
mechanism: Complement regulator affecting inflammatory burden and post-MI ventricular remodeling, predicting long-term cardiovascular outcomes.

references.title: Factors of Long-Term Prognosis for Cardiovascular Complications in Patients After Acute Myocardial Infarction, Based on the Plasma Proteome.
Thromboinflammation Supports Complement Activation in Cancer Patients With COVID-19.
